font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'
font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: I need help filling out my Anime North Compendium!

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Take photos of the subjects on this page.

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Please include yourself in the photos for scale.

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: A line of five would help us a ton.

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: I have rewards for the first few people to help!
